notes: SHIP v1.14.223 — DEPLOY DEAD-CARD FIX (the recurring 'tap WORK->Deploy does nothing' bug; this is the deploy-bug-hunt FIX ship, deferred from .222). ROOT CAUSE (found by a full control-flow trace, NOT a guess — the 4th attempt on this surface, so it was traced to ground): the WORK landing-grid Deploy card calls deploy_quick(), which branches on the saved active-deployment context. With a context set (which it is, permanently, once the owner has opened any deployment/rack — as during the .208-.217 verifies), deploy_quick takes the deploy_showRackDetail / deploy_showDetail branch. Those two functions render the deploy detail into deploy_opsHost() (= #wk-deploy under redesign) but NEVER drill out of the card grid — and CSS `body.rd #pg-work.wk-grid .work-sub { display:none !important }` (line 8721) force-hides that panel while the grid is showing. So the detail HTML painted into a display:none container: nothing visible, no exception thrown, phantom_logErr never fired — which is EXACTLY why the .221 instrument logged nothing (a silent SUCCESS into a hidden node, not a throw). This is the 'dead Work-grid card' class = CLAUDE.md's #1 hard rule (no silent failures). WHY the 3 prior fixes missed it: the nav_restore mscope path got the drill-out ('paints VISIBLY' verify-pass fix @ ~16962/16965), but the sibling deploy:/rack: restore branches AND the deploy_quick card path never did; the .214 fix was a different silent path (scope-picker sticky bar). FIX (root cause, minimal): a new idempotent, redesign-gated helper deploy_ensureDeployPanelVisible() (removes #pg-work.wk-grid + activates the wk-deploy stab via showStab, mirroring showWorkTab @17705/17708) called at the TOP of BOTH deploy_showDetail and deploy_showRackDetail — the two functions that OWN the #wk-deploy host. This guarantees the panel is visible before ANY caller renders detail into it, so it fixes the Deploy card (deploy_quick branches A/B) AND the identical latent nav_restore deploy:/rack: bug in one place. Idempotent (no-op if already drilled in, e.g. deep-linking rack detail from the deploy detail); redesign-only (legacy renders into #ops-content, no grid → early-returns → byte-identical). No control-flow change beyond making the host visible. ADVERSARIAL REVIEW (3 lenses, per-finding verified): correctness + regression lenses CLEAN (the fix works, no caller regressed); completeness lens found the SAME wk-grid class in the nav_restore sibling branches the initial fix missed — command (Deploy landing), tombstone:, and 5 deploy sub-tools (audit_log/optic_ledger/acceptance/handoff_gen/handoff_log), all reachable via back/forward-nav when the WORK bottom-nav re-added .wk-grid without a history push. FIX COMPLETED before push: added ONE key-gated drill-out (deploy_ensureDeployPanelVisible()) at the top of the nav_restore d-dispatch, matching /^command$|^deploy:|^rack:|^tombstone:|^audit_log:|^optic_ledger:|^acceptance:|^handoff_gen:|^handoff_log:/ — covers every deploy-surface branch in one place (idempotent; mscope/tool: self-drill, excluded; non-deploy sop:/job:/audit: excluded). So .223 now closes the card path (2 function guards) AND the back-nav path (1 dispatch guard) of the wk-grid dead-render class. SEPARATE FOLLOW-UP (NOT in .223 — different root cause): vendorEdp_open renders into a HARD-CODED legacy #ops-content (not deploy_opsHost), so 'ATTACH VENDOR EDP' on master-scoped deploys is dead 100% of the time under redesign (a 'no silent host fallback' hard-rule violation the wk-grid helper can't fix) — queued as the next ship (host repoint + loud warn). Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline blocks · CSS brace balance (no CSS change) · CRLF · three-stamp lockstep .222->.223 · helper defined once + called at both host functions. ROLLBACK: additive (1 helper + 2 one-line calls), git revert clean. IMMEDIATE WORKAROUND for the owner pre-update: the Command home DEPLOY tile drills out correctly (showWorkTab('deploy')) and DOES work — use it until .223 is installed. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP): CLEAN update to v1.14.223 (delete PWA from home screen -> reopen URL in Safari -> re-add; a reload will NOT clear the old service worker), confirm the stamp reads v1.14.223, then: (1) tap the WORK->Deploy card -> the Deploy Command Center (or your last deploy/rack detail) now PAINTS, no longer a dead tap; (2) works both with and without a saved active context; (3) rack-detail deep-link from the deploy detail still works (idempotent no-op case); (4) ?legacy=1 -> deploy path unchanged. If ANY deploy tap still does nothing after a clean update, grab SYS -> ERRORS -> COPY ALL (though this bug logs nothing since it doesn't throw) and report the exact tap + version. ALSO STILL OWED (batch, within the 6-ship cap): .220 3D parity + .221 instrument + .222 Forge 3D Stage 1.
